questions.question: What is the main difference between RMSprop and Adam optimization algorithms?
questions.hint: Both are adaptive learning rate methods, but RMSprop uses the squared gradient and Adam uses the squared and cubed gradient

questions.question: What is the parameter 'beta1' in Adam optimization algorithm?
questions.hint: Beta1 is the first moment estimate, used to track the moving average of the gradients

questions.question: How does RMSprop handle vanishing gradients compared to Adam?
questions.hint: RMSprop uses the squared gradient to normalize the learning rate, which helps to avoid vanishing gradients, whereas Adam uses both the squared and cubed gradient
